concept.title: The Concept
concept.p1: Mikrokosmos is not just a regular digital menu — it is a SaaS (Software as a Service) that uses design to create a fan experience inside a restaurant or café.
concept.p2: Through our Themed-Sync System, the establishment can completely change its visual identity with one click, keeping up with releases from the Korean music industry.
concept.p3: Each dish on the menu is a gastronomic narrative, connecting customers to their favorite artists through themed names and unique visual presentations.
concept.tagline: It is an extension of the favorite artist's music video, transformed into a culinary experience.

welcomeByRole.cozinha: {{greeting}}, Chef {{name}}! 👨‍🍳 Ready to create amazing dishes?

productsLong.1: Authentic Japanese ramen with crispy Korean fried chicken, marinated eggs, green onion and our special house sauce. An explosion of flavors that transcends universes.
productsLong.2: Artisan burger with a special blend, melted cheddar cheese, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato and secret sauce. Served with crispy french fries.
productsLong.3: A refreshing drink with a mix of red berries, mint and a citrus twist. Perfect with any meal in the MIKROKOSMOS universe.
productsLong.4: Fresh, crunchy cucumber in a light, refreshing sweet-and-sour dressing, a Japanese classic. Perfect as a starter or side dish.
productsLong.5: Filet mignon grilled to perfection, served with rustic potatoes and red wine sauce. A sophisticated dish that matches ENHYPEN's Dark Fantasy era.
productsLong.6: A unique sushi combination with salmon, cream cheese and teriyaki sauce, topped with golden sesame. Smooth like butter!
productsLong.7: An energizing bowl with seafood, rice, fresh vegetables and our special spicy sauce. Take your meal to the next level!
productsLong.8: Three tacos filled with bulgogi, kimchi and our spicy house sauce. An explosive fusion of Korean and Mexican flavors.
productsLong.9: Cheesecake with red berry sauce and dark chocolate. As irresistible as ENHYPEN's vampire concept.
productsLong.10: A creamy smoothie of açaí, blueberry and purple dragon fruit. The official BTS ARMY color in liquid form.
productsLong.11: Chicken wings marinated in spicy Korean sauce, fried until crispy. Savage to the last bite!
productsLong.12: Artisan pizza with buffalo mozzarella, prosciutto, arugula and fresh tomatoes. Special, just like Lisa herself.
productsLong.sw1: Double burger with a special blend, melted cheese, bacon and smoky BBQ sauce, served with seasoned rustic potatoes. As intense as Tatooine's twin suns.
productsLong.sw2: The authentic blue drink with tropical fruits, coconut milk and citrus notes. The same one Luke Skywalker drank at the Lars homestead.
productsLong.sw3: Ramen with black squid-ink broth, beef, marinated eggs and vegetables. As powerful as the Empire's space station.
productsLong.sw4: A long éclair filled with vanilla or chocolate cream, decorated with green (Jedi) or red (Sith) icing. Choose your side of the Force!
productsLong.sw5: Crispy chicken wings with intergalactic hot sauce. The favorite snack of smugglers and bounty hunters.
productsLong.mv1: Premium burger, french fries, crispy nuggets and a soda. A combo powerful enough to feed an Avenger after saving the world.
productsLong.mv2: Filet mignon grilled to perfection, served with truffled mashed potatoes and asparagus. As refined as Tony Stark himself.
productsLong.mv3: An energizing bowl with quinoa, grilled chicken, avocado, broccoli, edamame and special green sauce. Strength and nutrition in every bite!
productsLong.mv4: Energy drink with blue fruits, guarana and taurine. Glowing like the Arc reactor in Iron Man's chest.
productsLong.mv5: A creative roll with salmon, cream cheese, mango and spicy sauce, finished with web-like sauce threads. Friendly and delicious!
productsLong.mv6: Mini cheesecakes in 6 different flavors and colors, representing the Infinity Stones. Each with a unique power... of flavor!
productsLong.nj1: A refreshing bowl with Greek yogurt, assorted fresh fruit, crunchy granola and honey. Fresh like the NewJeans concept!
productsLong.nj2: A special box with 6 artisan cookies in different flavors: chocolate chip, red velvet, matcha and cookies & cream. OMG so good!
productsLong.nj3: A tropical mix of mango, passion fruit and coconut. Refreshing and full of energy for your hype boy!
productsLong.il1: A rice bowl with colorful vegetables, egg, marinated beef and gochujang sauce. As attractive as the Magnetic concept!
productsLong.il2: Creamy latte with special latte art and a touch of vanilla. For lucky girls who appreciate good coffee!
productsLong.il3: A trio of mini cakes with different flavors and adorable decorations. To cherish every sweet moment!
productsLong.sm1: Thin-crust New York-style pizza with special tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella and basil. The friendly neighborhood favorite!
productsLong.sm2: Al dente spaghetti with homemade marinara sauce, meatballs and parmesan. As connected as Spidey's webs!
productsLong.sm3: Creamy strawberry milkshake with whipped cream and special syrup. Activate your spider sense!
productsLong.mg1: A special sandwich with grilled chicken, cheese and rosé sauce, served with french fries. On Wednesdays we wear pink!
productsLong.mg2: Ultra-chocolate brownie with white chocolate chunks and walnuts. As intense as the Burn Book!
productsLong.mg3: Creamy caramel frappuccino with whipped cream and drizzle. Stop trying to make fetch happen... it's happening!
productsLong.is1: Gourmet burger with a special blend, gruyère cheese, caramelized onion and special sauce. Honesty: 90%. Flavor: 100%!
productsLong.is2: Artisan black pasta (squid ink) with fresh seafood and special sauce. A journey through the space-time of flavor!
productsLong.is3: A chocolate sphere that "explodes" to reveal mousse and red berries. A singularity of flavor!
productsLong.is4: A special blue drink with a fruit mix and citrus twist. Don't let me leave, Murph... Stay hydrated!
productsLong.rv1: Soft rice cakes simmered in creamy gochujang sauce with boiled eggs and fish cake. A Korean classic worthy of the most elegant leader.
productsLong.rv2: Grilled pork belly slices served with lettuce leaves, kimchi, roasted garlic, soybean paste and rice. The complete Korean experience!
productsLong.rv3: Traditional Korean stew with fermented kimchi, soft tofu, pork and mushrooms. Spicy, comforting and full of personality, just like Joy!
productsLong.rv4: A fried pancake, crispy outside and soft inside, filled with brown sugar, cinnamon and walnuts. The favorite street snack of the liveliest maknae!
productsLong.rv5: A crispy savory pancake with shrimp, squid, green onion and special soy dipping sauce. A tribute to the international member with a 100% Korean soul at heart!
productsLong.rv6: Finely shaved ice with condensed milk, fresh strawberries, mochi and strawberry syrup. As refreshing as Red Velvet's summer hit!
productsLong.rv7: A sweet, chilled traditional drink made from fermented rice and malt. Smooth and elegant like the group's Velvet side.
productsLong.rv8: Tender chicken stir-fried with gochujang, sweet potato, cabbage and green onion. Spicy and addictive, just like the Psycho era!
productsLong.sz1: Crispy chicken wings with special sauce and seasoned rustic potatoes, made for sharing with the crowd. Limited-edition World Cup season combo!
productsLong.sz2: A refreshing tropical mix, energizing enough to cheer through all 90 minutes. Available only during World Cup season!
productsLong.sz3: Two smaller portions of grilled filet with creamy risotto, made for sharing with someone you love. Valentine's Day special edition, for a limited time.
productsLong.sz4: A pair of heart-shaped mini cheesecakes with red berry sauce. The perfect treat to end Valentine's Day on a high note.
productsLong.sz5: A rice bowl with colorful vegetables representing the new era's colors, marinated beef and special sauce. Released with the comeback — comes with a chance of an exclusive era photocard!
productsLong.sz6: A colorful, fizzy drink inspired by the lightsticks that light up concerts. "Comeback Season" edition — only during the new era's launch!
productsLong.sz7: A popcorn bucket, nachos with spicy sauce and an intensely red soda. The perfect combo for Cinema Horror Night's scary session.
productsLong.sz8: An intense red-berry drink served with a smoke effect, created especially for Cinema Horror Night. Frighteningly delicious!
